Table of Contents

Interface IMapDescription

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the available properties of a map description object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4A81AFFE-0883-4062-8536-85AB858A10A5")]
public interface IMapDescription

Properties

LayerDescriptions

A collection of Layer Description objects, each describing a layer within the map (data frame).

ILayerDescriptions LayerDescriptions { get; set; }

Property Value

ILayerDescriptions

Examples

Sample Snippet

MapArea

The display area of the map (data frame).

IMapArea MapArea { get; set; }

Property Value

IMapArea

Examples

Sample Snippet

MapRotation

The angle/rotation of the map (data frame) in degrees, measured anti-clockwise.

double MapRotation { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

The name of the map (data frame).

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

The spatial reference of the map (data frame).

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

TransparentColor

The color that is transparent (100 %).

IColorDescription TransparentColor { get; set; }

Property Value

IColorDescription
